notes: S3G8-TC176: Full lifecycle via action buttons. ORD-016 walked through Draft->Submitted->Approved->In Production->Quality Check->Completed using action buttons on detail page. Each transition showed success notification and status updated correctly.

S3G8-TC177: Quality Hold loop on ORD-007. Performed hold->release->hold->release cycle via action buttons. All transitions succeeded with correct notifications (quality hold successful, release successful).
S3G8-TC178: Reject and resubmit flow. Admin rejected ORD-014 (Submitted->Draft). Resubmission observed. Admin approved the resubmitted order. Full reject-resubmit-approve cycle completed.
S3G8-TC179: Operator submitted ORD-023 via Submit for Approval action button on detail page. Status changed to Submitted with success notification. Verified card moved to Submitted column on Kanban.
S3G8-TC180: Kanban board shows orders distributed across all 7 columns: Draft(3), Submitted(3), Approved(8), In Production(5), Quality Check(1), Quality Hold(2), Completed(3).

S3G8-TC181: Success notifications observed throughout testing showing transition details: 'Order submit successful', 'Order approve successful', 'Order quality hold successful', 'Order release successful', 'Order complete successful'.
S3G8-TC182: Error notification on invalid transition observed: 'Cannot quality_hold from status quality_hold. Valid from: quality_check'. Error toast displayed with red indicator.

S3G8-TC183: Admin verified activity log accuracy on ORD-016. After 3 transitions (Draft->Submitted->Approved->In Production->Quality Check->Completed), activity log showed creation + all transitions in correct chronological order with USR-001 attribution.

S3G8-TC185: Admin performed 3 rapid transitions on ORD-022 (Draft->Submitted->Approved->In Production) in quick succession. Each produced separate success notification. Order reached In Production with all transitions recorded in activity log.
S3G8-TC186: Operator submitted ORD-023 via detail page action button (verified in TC179). Status changed to Submitted, success toast shown, card confirmed in Submitted column on Kanban.
S3G8-TC187: Quality Hold order (ORD-008) only shows Release button. No Approve option available, preventing invalid Quality Hold -> Approved transition.
